title: kb.autoingest v1
description: Emitted by kb at the end of a `kb autoingest` run (src/commands/autoingest.rs:147) — session ingest, planning-doc ingest, promotion pass, graph enqueue, and repo-plugin projection. Source: /kb.

since.description: Lower bound of the ingest window (as passed to the run).

project.description: Project the autoingest run scoped to.

branch.description: Git branch active at ingest time.

worktree.description: Worktree label active at ingest time.
